visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Tim, a male main character, stands in a brightly lit studio environment. He wears a grey and white plaid newsboy cap, gold-rimmed glasses, and a light blue long-sleeved sweater. He is highly active, using frequent hand gestures and pointing towards the camera as he speaks. The background is a clean, neutral grey with a distinctive red border and a white brand banner at the top left. (2) The scene cuts to a young woman lying in a dark bedroom at night, her face illuminated by the bright blue glow of her smartphone. She is resting on a grey pillow under a patterned duvet. (3) A cartoon graphic of a male scientist with glasses and messy hair appears in a laboratory setting, holding a paper. This is followed by an animation of two green, angry-faced bacteria cells floating on a light green background. (4) A series of illustrative clips follow: a close-up of a toilet seat covered in dark stains under a harsh blue light, a high-detail close-up of a person's skin with numerous sweat droplets, and a bright sunny bedroom with white pillows and a yellow duvet. (5) A microscopic CGI animation shows various orange and pink bacteria or virus particles floating in a dark fluid. (6) Tim returns to the studio setting, continuing his energetic speech. (7) A final scene shows a woman sleeping in a bed from an overhead angle. Her hand is resting next to a smartphone placed directly on the mattress, alongside a teddy bear with a red bow. The lighting is soft and domestic.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 睡前手機. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 千萬不能這樣做!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 否則會滋生蟑螂病菌!. (4) [Subtitle]: 相信現在很多人在習慣睡前在躺在床上滑手機. (5) [Subtitle]: 對 就是指Tim嫂 我在指你. (6) [Subtitle]: 但英國的《每日郵報》報導寫說. (7) [Subtitle]: 科學家在指出他在手機暗藏的細菌比馬桶. (8) [Subtitle]: 繞十幾圈還髒耶. (9) [Subtitle]: 甚至還發現到一種名為銅綠假單胞菌的細菌. (10) [Subtitle]: 欸 這種有害細菌通常會出現在蟑螂糞便中. (11) [Subtitle]: 由於一般人普遍一晚會出汗高達700毫升. (12) [Subtitle]: 加上床本身的溫度通常可達20度C左右. (13) [Subtitle]: 剛好形成一個溫暖潮濕的環境. (14) [Subtitle]: 正好很適合這個病菌來生長. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以盡量避免在床上滑手機. (16) [Subtitle]: 也不要將手機直接擺在床上睡覺. (17) [Subtitle]: 否則長期接觸有可能會導致你有皮疹 肺炎 甚至於敗血症.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main speaker (Tim), 1 female character appearing in B-roll shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Tim is wearing a grey and white plaid newsboy cap, gold-rimmed glasses, and a light blue long-sleeved sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Neutral grey studio with branding for the main speaker. A dark bedroom with a bed and smartphone for the B-roll. Cartoon laboratory and microscopic animations for scientific points.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker (Tim) initiates a fast-paced, energetic speech in Traditional Chinese. His voice is clear, with high pitch variability indicating excitement. An upbeat electronic pop BGM with a prominent 4/4 drum beat and bright synth pads begins immediately as the foundation. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX and a percussive 'hit' SFX coincide with the visual transition to the bedroom scene. The speaker's voice maintains its high-energy narrative tone, projecting clearly over the background music. (3) During the cartoon graphics phase, quick 'pop' and 'bubble' SFX are used to emphasize the appearance of the scientist and bacteria. The speaker's pitch rises when mentioning scientific terms like 'Pseudomonas aeruginosa.' (4) The audio continues with a dense vocal track, with the speaker explaining the relationship between sweat, temperature, and bacteria. The BGM remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing a steady rhythmic drive. (5) As the speaker delivers the health warnings, his voice takes on a more authoritative yet still animated quality. A final transition 'whoosh' sound effects lead into the closing advice, while the music stays energized until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Statement -> Scientific Evidence -> Mechanism of Action -> Potential Risks -> Health Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate the audience on the hygiene hazards of using smartphones in bed by presenting scientific research on bacterial growth (specifically Pseudomonas aeruginosa) linked to human sweat and cockroach feces, ultimately warning against sleeping with phones on the bed.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A 'miko' brand logo and professional influencer branding ('3c有意思tim哥') are consistently present throughout the video frame.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a typical high-energy 'short-form' social media format, using fast cuts, vibrant text overlays, and a mix of personal addresses and educational B-roll to deliver technical and health-related information quickly.
